schools.name: Patagonian School of Mystical Arts
schools.location: Southern Patagonia, near the Leaf Falls
schools.description: The oldest specialist academy in the llamaverse, the Patagonian School of Mystical Arts has trained generations of secret-power practitioners and philosophers. Its entrance examination is oral and lasts three days, conducted entirely outdoors regardless of weather. The school has no fixed curriculum; students design their own programme with a faculty mentor. Angela studied here for four years; the school claims her heritage designation as its greatest honour.
